title: Serpent Form
description: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]4[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
smart_description: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
notes: Triggers immediately after each card played by the player owner. Deals damage equal to the power's Amount to a random hittable enemy. Uses Counter stack type to track stacked instances.
